systems.name: opencode session subsystem
systems.description: Per-session state, runloop, LLM streaming, tool dispatch, compaction

containers.name: opencode daemon (bun)
containers.description: Single long-running process serving sessions over Unix socket

containers.name: Session message stream
containers.description: Authoritative chronological record of user/assistant/tool messages

containers.name: External LLM provider
containers.description: Used both for primary task execution and as the digesting LLM in chunked-digest

components.name: ToolFramework
components.description: Populates ctx.outputBudget on every tool dispatch; reads tweaks.cfg + active model context.
responsibilities: Compute ctx.outputBudget per call using DD-2 formula and DD-10 overrides
Inject ctx.outputBudget into tool invocation context
Forward tool result string to runtime unchanged

components.name: VariableSizeTool
components.description: Set of tools that self-bound their output to ctx.outputBudget. Each implements its own semantic-boundary slicer.
responsibilities: Run primary tool work (read/exec/fetch)
Estimate natural output token count
If over budget, slice on tool-natural unit (line/match/message/paragraph)
Append plain-language hint with [Truncated] anchor token, fraction, and exact arg adjustment
If output is atomic and unsliceable (apply_patch diff), raise structured tool error instead of sliding

components.name: TweaksConfigParser
components.description: Reads tweaks.cfg keys with ratio-or-absolute syntax.
responsibilities: Parse tool_output_budget_default and tool_output_budget.<name>
Parse chunked_digest_chunk_target_tokens, chunked_digest_max_chunks, verify_after_compact
Resolve ratio strings against active model context
Apply documented defaults when key absent

components.name: SessionCompactionRun
components.description: Single entry point for compaction execution; extended with KIND_CHAIN tail entry chunked-digest and verify-after-compact step.
responsibilities: Walk KIND_CHAIN narrative → replay-tail → low-cost-server → llm-agent → chunked-digest
Call kind handler; if success, run verify-after-compact
Escalate to next kind when verification fails or kind fails structurally
Raise E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE when chain exhausts
Emit per-kind telemetry

components.name: ChunkedDigestKind
components.description: Terminal compaction kind: drives the digesting LLM through chunk-by-chunk digestion of round-aligned history; finalises as a normal Anchor.
responsibilities: Identify closed rounds and exclude system prompt + trailing unfinished round
Split rounds into N chunks of ~chunked_digest_chunk_target_tokens
Issue (digest_so_far, chunk_k, framing_prompt) per chunk
Validate response (JSON digest, no tool_calls); retry up to 2x with stricter framing on tool_call
Merge digests across chunks
Write merged digest as Anchor message; re-attach triggering user request

components.name: FramingPromptSource
components.description: Source of the framing prompt that re-roles the model from executor to digester. Two variants: standard and stricter (used on retry).
responsibilities: Hold canonical prompt text
Provide standard and stricter variants
Specify required digest output JSON shape (entities, decisions, file refs, open threads)

components.name: VerifyAfterCompact
components.description: Re-estimates resulting prompt size after each kind succeeds.
responsibilities: Call estimateMsgsTokenCount on resulting message stream
Compare against model per-request budget
Return verified-success or escalation signal
Honour tweaks.verify_after_compact toggle

components.name: TokenEstimator
components.description: Existing token estimator from compaction-redesign; reused unchanged for both tool self-bounding and verify-after-compact.
responsibilities: Estimate token count for a single string
Estimate token count for a message-stream array

components.name: Runloop
components.description: Existing runloop. Receives compaction success or E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE from SessionCompaction.run; surfaces terminal error to user-facing path.
responsibilities: Call SessionCompaction.run when state-driven evaluator reports overflow
On success, continue with next iteration
On E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE, surface to user with hint

relationships.label: calls run({observed, step, sessionID}) on overflow
every tool call goes through framework
delegates to tryChunkedDigest as terminal kind
calls verifyAfterCompact after each kind succeeds
